zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Blundell於1439年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親William Blundell29歲，母親Eva Howell31歲。她於1459年與Roger Oakley在英國英格蘭史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Blundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): from Old French blondel, a diminutive of blond ‘blond, fair’, used for someone with fair hair or a fair complexion and also used as a personal name. Compare Blunt .

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

variants.name: Blondell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Emile.
Swedish: ornamental name from blond ‘of light hair color’ or ‘of light complexion’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Blundell was born in 1439, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Blundell, was 29 and her mother, Eva Howell, was 31. She married Roger Oakley in 1459, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1510, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Blundellが1439年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Blundellは29歳，母Eva Howellは31歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアビショプ'ス カストルでRoger Oakleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Blundell(이)가 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Blundell(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Howell(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 Roger Oakley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Blundell родилась в 1439 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Blundell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Howell, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Oakley в 1459 г. в местности бишоп'с кастл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
